name: stackra/notifications-in-app
purpose: In-app notification channel — registers the in_app driver with the notifications core, writes InAppMessage rows synchronously, and broadcasts on Reverb for live inbox updates.
capabilities: Reverb broadcast on user.{id}.notifications for live updates
when_to_use: An app needs an in-app bell inbox with live-updating message rows.
when_not_to_use: For email delivery, use stackra/notifications-mail. For push or SMS, use the matching channel packages.
